choices.text: Paid provider (Helius, QuickNode, Triton, Syndica) with SLA. Public RPC api.mainnet-beta.solana.com rate-limited to ~40 req/10s; fails first scale. Failover to second provider for reliability.

Cache hot data with TTL; batch with getMultipleAccountsInfo; WebSocket subscriptions instead of polling; use enhanced APIs (DAS for NFTs) instead of getProgramAccounts. Indexer/GraphQL for complex queries.
